info.title: Amazon Bedrock API
info.description: Amazon Bedrock API for foundation model access, customization, evaluation, guardrails, knowledge bases, agents, and model inference. Includes both control plane (bedrock) and data plane (bedrock-runtime) operations.

get.description: List available foundation models with optional filters
Get details about a specific foundation model
Get details about a custom model

post.description: Create a fine-tuning or continued pre-training job

get.description: Get details about a customization job

post.description: Create a guardrail for content filtering
Create a new version of a guardrail
Copy a model to another region
Create a knowledge base for RAG
Create a data source for a knowledge base

get.description: List data sources for a knowledge base

post.description: Invoke a foundation model for inference
Invoke a model with streaming response
Send messages to a model using the Converse API
Retrieve relevant information from a knowledge base
Retrieve from KB and generate a response

BedrockResponse.description: Generic Bedrock API response. Structure varies by endpoint.
